title: End-to-end validation against live hegel-core server
description: Validate all four conjectures (C-001 through C-004) against a live hegel-core 0.2.2 server. Run examples/basic.scm end-to-end. Capture wire traffic to confirm framing and handshake behavior.
close_reason: EVV complete. Major finding: hegel-core 0.2.2 protocol is entirely different from conjectures. C-001 REFUTED (HEGL packet framing, not uint32-BE), C-002 REFUTED (raw bytes handshake, not CBOR), C-003 CONFIRMED (snake_case keys), C-004 PARTIALLY REFUTED (command/event pattern, Status enum). Schema type names also wrong (plural→singular). Filed hegel-guile-2 through hegel-guile-7 for remediation.

title: C-001 REFUTED: Wire format is HEGL packet framing, not uint32-BE length prefix
description: hegel-core 0.2.2 uses a structured packet format: [magic 0x4845474C][CRC32][channel_id][message_id][payload_length][payload][0x0A terminator]. Not simple length-prefixed CBOR. cbor.scm cbor-encode-to-port and cbor-decode-from-port must be replaced with packet-level framing. See .venv/.../hegel/protocol/packet.py for the wire spec.

title: C-002 REFUTED: Handshake is raw bytes, not CBOR message
description: hegel-core 0.2.2 handshake: client sends raw b'hegel_handshake_start' on channel 0, server replies b'Hegel/0.7'. Not the CBOR {type: handshake, client: ..., version: ...} format. protocol.scm msg-handshake and server.scm handshake logic must be rewritten.

title: C-004 PARTIAL REFUTATION: Protocol uses command/event pattern, not type-based messages
description: hegel-core 0.2.2 uses {command: generate/mark_complete/run_test} and {event: test_case/test_done}. Status uses Hypothesis Status enum (VALID/INVALID/INTERESTING). Not the {type: draw/finish_test_case, status: passed/failed/invalid} format. All protocol.scm message constructors need rewriting.

title: Schema type names don't match hegel-core: integers→integer, booleans→boolean, etc.
description: generators.scm uses plural type names (integers, booleans, floats, text, lists) but hegel-core schema.py expects singular (integer, boolean, float, string, list). Also one_of is a top-level key, not a type field. All generator functions must be updated.

title: Implement HEGL packet framing layer (packet.scm)
description: New module src/hegel/packet.scm implementing: read-packet/write-packet with magic cookie 0x4845474C, CRC32 checksum, channel_id, message_id with reply bit, payload length, payload, 0x0A terminator. This replaces cbor-encode-to-port/cbor-decode-from-port for wire I/O.

title: Implement channel multiplexing layer (channel.scm)
description: New module src/hegel/channel.scm implementing multiplexed channels over a single connection. Control channel (id 0) for handshake and run_test. Client channels (odd ids) for test execution. Request/reply with message IDs.
